meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Tyler Slaton: Build User Facing Agentic Applications with AG UI
meta.description:
What does it take to build a production-ready full-stack agentic application?

In this talk by Tyler Slaton, Senior Founding Engineer of CopilotKit, attendees explored the patterns that define great agentic apps, and how to actually get started building one with AG-UI and any agent framework.

-----------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
